tests/test_receipt_parser_service.py :: test_split_trailing_amount_reads_right_aligned_values
def test_split_trailing_amount_reads_right_aligned_values():
    left, amount = _split_trailing_amount("Burger                       12.00")
    assert left == "Burger"
    assert amount == Decimal("12.00")

tests/test_receipt_parser_service.py :: test_classify_summary_label_handles_generalized_footer_layout
def test_classify_summary_label_handles_generalized_footer_layout():
    assert _classify_summary_label("Subtotal") == "subtotal"
    assert _classify_summary_label("Sales Tax") == "tax"
    assert _classify_summary_label("Amount Due") == "total"

tests/test_receipt_parser_service.py :: test_parse_receipt_text_extracts_items_and_totals_from_standard_layout
def test_parse_receipt_text_extracts_items_and_totals_from_standard_layout():
    parsed = _parse_receipt_text(SAMPLE_RECEIPT)

    assert parsed.merchant_name == "Joe's Diner"
    assert parsed.subtotal == Decimal("31.50")
    assert parsed.tax == Decimal("2.52")
    assert parsed.total == Decimal("34.02")
    assert len(parsed.items) == 3
    assert parsed.items[0].name == "Burger"
    assert parsed.items[0].quantity == 2
    assert parsed.items[0].price == Decimal("24.00")
    assert parsed.items[1].name == "Fries"
    assert parsed.items[1].price == Decimal("4.50")

tests/test_receipt_parser_service.py :: test_local_parse_is_sufficient_for_single_item_with_matching_total
def test_local_parse_is_sufficient_for_single_item_with_matching_total():
    payload = CleanupReceiptPayload(
        items=[CleanupReceiptItem(name="Latte", price=Decimal("5.50"), quantity=1)],
        tax=Decimal("0.44"),
        total=Decimal("5.94"),
    )
    assert _local_parse_is_sufficient(payload)
